review_rows.hard_point: day-level events converted into minute-visible state updates need first_visible_ts and close-bar activation discipline
point_in_time_intraday_visibility is the hardest blocker and must stay first
shadow lane must remain read-only relative to the frozen EOD primary

consensus_rows.detail: the three-workstream order is correct and remains aligned with the frozen EOD primary posture
add first_visible_ts and close-bar activation semantics before any minute-state feed is considered lawful
enforce a one-way read-only boundary so the intraday shadow lane cannot mutate or back-propagate into the frozen EOD primary
begin only phase_1_visibility buildout after the two guardrails are hard-coded; do not jump ahead to simulator or replay binding

interpretation: V1.33N converts the three-subagent review into an explicit triage result for the intraday execution build protocol.
The direction is approved, but only with hard point-in-time visibility and read-only isolation guardrails in place.
